steps.title: Spot the signal of abundance
steps.content: The phrase “as many different interpretations as there are people to listen to them” is the decisive clue—it emphasizes that the music's meanings are countless.

steps.title: Find the word that fits
steps.content:
Myriad means countless or very many, which directly expresses the abundance the passage describes.

Superficial (shallow), deficient (lacking), and untenable (indefensible) fail to capture the passage's emphasis on multiple legitimate interpretations.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
